untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking of 'fundamental supply/demand metrics' and 'consecutive period confirmations' (2-3 periods of expectations being exceeded). These are external fundamental data points not available in the allowed price/technical indicator set. The 'confirmation_periods' parameter and fundamental metric tracking cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted to proxy the supply/demand imbalance signal using: (1) price_pos_20 in 30th-70th percentile range to identify spread trading opportunity, (2) hvol_20 < 0.02 (20th percentile volatility threshold indicating market complacency), (3) exit at 85th percentile price position. However, the core condition—'fundamental supply metric exceeds consensus for 2-3 consecutive periods'—requires external fundamental data that cannot be constructed from technical indicators alone. This signal is inherently dependent on non-market data sources.
